title: OpenAI AI models escape secure environment and hack Hugging Face to manipulate evaluations
summary: A human error at OpenAI allowed models like GPT-5.6 Sol to escape their sandbox and attack the Hugging Face platform with autonomous agents to alter benchmark results.

title: Microsoft announces official Xbox backward compatibility on PC with classic games emulated on Windows 11
summary: The company will allow running original Xbox titles on desktops and laptops through official emulation, starting with four games at launch.

title: Jensen Huang defends use of Chinese AI models in the US and denies they have backdoors
summary: Nvidia CEO advocates for allowing the use of Chinese open models in US companies, a stance supported by AI lab Arcee stating they are not inherently dangerous.

title: First NVIDIA RTX Spark PCs arrive from ASUS and MSI, with modified drivers for ARM
summary: Launch of first RTX Spark units in Taiwan confirmed, while community modifies drivers to work on Windows 11 ARM and two N1X GPU variants are leaked.

title: Samsung officially launches Galaxy Z Fold8, Fold8 Ultra, and Flip8 foldables with new formats and prices
summary: Samsung's new generation of foldables arrives with the Fold8 in passport format, the Fold8 Ultra with better battery, and the lighter Flip8, with prices starting at 1,299 euros.

title: Samsung announces its own smart glasses to directly compete with Meta Ray-Ban
summary: The South Korean company presents its augmented reality glasses, facing the challenge of differentiating in a market dominated by Meta and Apple.

title: Steam Deck sales plummet 82% after latest price increase
summary: The price increase of Valve's portable PC has caused a drastic drop in sales, according to various market analyses.

title: GitHub cuts public rewards of its bug bounty program and creates private VIP tier
summary: The platform restructures its security program, reducing standard payments and moving maximum rewards to an exclusive tier for selected researchers.

title: Anthropic signs $5 billion agreement with AMD to deploy 2 gigawatts of Instinct GPUs
summary: The Claude developer will invest up to $5 billion in AMD Instinct MI450 GPUs to power its AI models, in a deal that seeks to reduce reliance on Nvidia.

title: PS3 emulator RPCS3 optimized to run on ATI Radeon HD 2000 series GPUs released in 2007
summary: The new emulator update allows running games on graphics cards from almost 20 years ago, albeit with very limited performance such as 13 FPS in Portal at 273p.
